title: Read and interpret maps
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Read and interpret maps demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan a route using a map

pcs.text: Select maps, equipment and navigation aids and check for accuracy, currency and operational effectiveness for intended use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select maps, equipment and navigation aids and check for accuracy, currency and operational effectiveness for intended use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select maps, equipment and navigation aids and check for accuracy, currency and operational effectiveness for intended use.

pcs.text: Identify relevant symbols, information and navigation on map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant symbols, information and navigation on map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant symbols, information and navigation on map.

pcs.text: Identify and locate current position in the field on map using geographical features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate current position in the field on map using geographical features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate current position in the field on map using geographical features.

pcs.text: Identify and locate required destination on map
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate required destination on map?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate required destination on map.

pcs.text: Assess and select route to destination using map data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and select route to destination using map data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and select route to destination using map data.

pcs.text: Plan a safe route to destination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan a safe route to destination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan a safe route to destination.

pcs.text: Measure and estimate distance to destination using map scale for selected route
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and estimate distance to destination using map scale for selected route?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and estimate distance to destination using map scale for selected route.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan a route using a map

elements.title: Navigate using a map

pcs.text: Navigate and traverse a route according to plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Navigate and traverse a route according to plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Navigate and traverse a route according to plan.

pcs.text: Orient the map or plan to surroundings and planned route
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Orient the map or plan to surroundings and planned route?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Orient the map or plan to surroundings and planned route.

pcs.text: Use navigation aids to assist progress according to manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use navigation aids to assist progress according to manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use navigation aids to assist progress according to manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Plan and navigate alternative routes to avoid inefficient route progress
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and navigate alternative routes to avoid inefficient route progress?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and navigate alternative routes to avoid inefficient route progress.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Navigate using a map

elements.title: Plot sites and locations using maps and Global Positioning System (GPS)

pcs.text: Identify and locate point on map using landmarks and key geographical features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate point on map using landmarks and key geographical features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate point on map using landmarks and key geographical features.

pcs.text: Use GPS in conjunction with paper maps and charts according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use GPS in conjunction with paper maps and charts according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use GPS in conjunction with paper maps and charts according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Adjust GPS settings to required datum and measurement units
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust GPS settings to required datum and measurement units?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust GPS settings to required datum and measurement units.

pcs.text: Use GPS data to precisely record locations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use GPS data to precisely record locations.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document navigation activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document navigation activity.
